horoscope: With the Moon in your opposite sign all day, dear Aries, you're inclined to seek out balance in your life. However, it's a little too easy to get worked up or stressed over issues that may not be very important in the long run with today's transits. Try to find opportunities to get to the true reason for your discontent. You may want to watch for a brusque or impatient manner with others. Try to settle your mind, as it could very well be racing with plans and ideas. While you tend to embrace change you feel is truly worthwhile, today you could feel like an overloaded circuit board. Before you burn out, take a step back, take stock of your situation, and slow down a little. Watch for hasty communications. Work independently, if at all possible, so that you can set your own pace. In spots today, emotions may leave you feeling stuck in a state of frustration or discontent. Cautious planning will ensure greater success for the time being.

Tensions about money or friendship can surface today, dear Taurus, as Mars is challenged by Uranus and the Moon. However, this can also be a time to look for new ways of doing things. Mars is simply stirring the pot to direct you to problem areas. Be bold in your thinking to make a breakthrough. The Moon spends the day in your sector of work and routines, highlighting your daily affairs and desire to be useful. While it can be a good period of the lunar month for getting your life straightened out in small ways, there can be quite a bit of pressure or tension involved that ends up detracting from productivity. You don't have to ignore your motivation to set things right, but it's a good idea to do what you can to pace yourself. Passions tend to rise even though you prefer to keep things even and smooth.

You can become rather quickly agitated by circumstances or people that seem to restrict you today, dear Gemini. You may also be impatient with routines and methods that you've been using for so long that you've become bored. Aim to use tense energy positively and mindfully by adopting a different approach to what you're doing. The Moon in your creative sector all day brings more light to your personality. You're drawn to rejuvenating activities. Expressing yourself and sharing can be a strong draw. However, sensitivity on a social level can lead to quick reactions, which can heat things up. Getting things out into the open can be purging, but today's energies tend to encourage sloppy approaches, and you might decide that waiting to address issues is for the best.

You are likely to find new ways of thinking about old problems, or new methods altogether, that allow you to keep the best of the old but also enable opening yourself up to the new, dear Cancer. Still, getting to this point can be a bit rocky or stressful. On the work front or with the public and authority figures, there can be some impatience or disagreements, for example. You might feel caught in the middle, but could take on the role of mediator quite successfully. It's an excellent day for discovering resources you never knew you had, and for revitalizing the old instead of discarding it outright. However, it's important to go gently and employ strategy rather than push or prod today, as egos can be a little fragile and tempers short. Others will see your vision soon enough once they pull themselves out of their own problems. You can also feel quite motivated to bring order or harmony to your home or personal life. It might not be easy getting over frustrations, but allowing them to motivate you to make changes or put an irritating situation behind you can be productive.

There can be frustrations with friends or disagreements with beliefs and ideologies today, dear Leo. With minor challenging aspects involving Mars, unpredictability seems to be the order of the day. If you raise yourself above an ego level, your interactions can lead to breakthroughs in thinking or could stimulate a whole new line of thought, perhaps an opposing one, that inspires you. Even so, you can be hard to keep up with at times today. Slow down if others don't seem to be keeping pace with your ideas. Avoid being dogmatic; instead, consider others' ideas and allow an open-minded flow of energy to circulate. You can be attracted to personal interests, but you find it hard to attend to all your needs and desires. Keep in mind that rushing through your tasks will more than likely lead to mistakes and disagreements under current influences. Get in better touch with your true desires before taking action.

You're attracted to what is hidden from sight today, and particularly the reasons why that might be, dear Virgo. Some dispassion might be in order right now, only enough to step aside from a situation to gain some perspective. If you can manage it, this can be a strong day for learning a new way to handle a financial matter, or a new technique for increased intimacy. Still, try not to rely heavily on others today, as things may not go as planned. Setting clear boundaries in your relationships isn't always easy, and relying on body language alone isn't enough, since people who overstep boundaries often don't pick up on subtle cues. Today, you may need to be more direct. Comfort needs assume special importance today with the Moon in your solar second house all day.

Today's Moon is in your sign, dear Libra, and you're in the spotlight. Differences and problem areas are in strong focus, however, and it may not be straightforward to see around them at first glance. You may need to get something off your chest. You are inclined to go your own way, but you also seek acknowledgment from others, which is complicated. There can be brusqueness or impatience in someone close to you that rubs you the wrong way. It may be too easy to get involved in an argument or a standoff as a result. Because the day's energies are a little noisy in spots, your increased sensitivity could leave you frustrated too easily with people and circumstances. Do your best to tune the noise out and let the ideas flow. Outworn methods, routines, and patterns of relating are being challenged right now, and if you can raise yourself above any petty conflicts that might arise, you may very well see where improvements can be made.

The desire to take on new challenges can be strong now, dear Scorpio, particularly those that don't revolve around the same old routines you've been stuck in. However, you may not know where to start, or you might be expecting too much from yourself, too soon. Start small, do little things that are different, and vary your routine for the best results. It's preferable to succumbing to tension. The intensity you feel today can help you focus or throw you entirely off course, depending on how you manage things. While you may begin by spinning your wheels, as the day progresses, you can make some serious headway if you choose a project and tune out distractions. The Moon spends the day in your privacy sector, and getting in touch with true needs and wants should probably be a priority. Remind yourself that you need some breathing room.

The Moon spends the day in your social sector, dear Sagittarius, and you seek some relaxed and easygoing activities. While you may want to push ahead with personal plans, you could encounter resistance today. This can be a time when others' unreliability, indifference, or irritability can be more pronounced in your mind, and you're especially sensitive to it. Try not to let others' moods define your day. Avoid getting caught up in conflicts unless you are certain that it will lead to greater understanding. Keep it cool and real, so you can turn it around and get results. You may vacillate between wanting to do something independently and wanting others' involvement. Aim to take note of some of the information coming your way, as something can trigger a good, creative idea.

The Moon spends the day in your responsibility sector, dear Capricorn, and you're in a productive, goal-oriented frame of mind. Still, there can be tensions, particularly with family, work, or people close to home, if you're doing the same old things or relating to one another in tired, unhealthy ways. You can find it challenging to get your way today, but stop to consider whether "your way" is what you should be pursuing right now. Pushing seems only to frustrate today. You don't have to sit on your hands, but you could stand to review your goals and perhaps reevaluate them. Others may seem to be slowing you down today, and you may decide it's better to work independently.

The Moon encourages your lighter, more spontaneous side today, dear Aquarius. This transit is not only about escaping the ordinary, but it's about expanding your experiences or your mind. Still, your natural instincts may not be serving you as well as they normally do at times today, and you could feel just a little out of step, particularly when it comes to saying the right thing. Worries have a way of emerging to the foreground, and small problems of recent days suddenly take on larger proportions in your mind. Your best bet today is to attend to practical affairs as best as you can. Guilt for not doing what you know you should do is a useless energy, so don't allow it to creep up on you. There is little risk of losing yourself by being too obliging just now, as it's a fine time to weigh options and consider others' points of view, bringing balance to your life.

The Moon spends the day in your sector of shared resources, dear Pisces, and you're seeing layers of situations that escaped your notice in the past. You crave a deeper approach or a feeling of connection. A passing whim may be seductive, or you could find yourself spinning your wheels. There can be hectic, impatient energy in spots today. There is growing emphasis on your spending habits, possessions, and wants and desires these days, and ideally, you're coming to a better understanding of how you should handle your money. However, today you can be quite temperamental about these things, and about whether others value you as well. There could be disagreements with family about spending, or a feeling of insecurity about your resources. It's important to take things one step at a time. In truth, the tension created now can spur you on and motivate you, but don't expect to fix everything all at once.
